stories.title: West playoff takeaways: Timberwolves rally past Nuggets to even series
stories.summary: Here's what has stood out from the latest playoff games of the Western Conference's first round.

stories.title: McCollum plays MSG villain as Hawks tie series
stories.summary: CJ McCollum became the latest to join the list of Madison Square Garden villains as his fourth-quarter exploits helped the Hawks tie their first-round series against the Knicks with a come-from-behind 107-106 win in Game 2.

stories.title: McDaniels jab: Nuggets are 'all bad defenders'
stories.summary: Jaden McDaniels took perhaps his most notable shot after Minnesota's 119-114 Game 2 playoff win at Denver, saying the Nuggets are "all bad defenders."

stories.title: Gobert carries DPOY snub into Jokic matchup, win
stories.summary: On the same day he finished fourth in Defensive Player of the Year voting, Timberwolves center Rudy Gobert held three-time MVP Nikola Jokic to 1-of-8 shooting in their Game 2 matchup, helping Minnesota to a series-tying 119-114 win.

stories.title: Martinook lifts Canes in 2OT after goal overturn
stories.summary: Jordan Martinook, who was stopped on a penalty shot in the first overtime session after a potential winning goal was overturned, beat Linus Ullmark at 13:53 of the second overtime to help the Carolina Hurricanes past the Ottawa Senators 3-2 Monday night.

stories.title: Teen dies, Coach K's grandson charged with DWI
stories.summary: Joseph Savarino, a grandson of retired coach Mike Krzyzewski, was charged with misdemeanor driving while impaired in connection with a collision that killed a 15-year-old bicyclist.

stories.title: PGA Tour boots both Hawaii events from '27 sked
stories.summary: The PGA Tour will not be in Hawaii in 2027 for the first time in 56 years as it moves toward a revamped schedule that no longer will start the season in the middle of the Pacific Ocean.

stories.title: Counsell: MLB rule in place for Ohtani 'bizarre'
stories.summary: Chicago Cubs manager Craig Counsell thinks that a Major League Baseball rule that allows the Los Angeles Dodgers to carry 14 pitchers because of Shohei Ohtani is "bizarre," adding that the defending National League MVP is getting "special consideration."

stories.title: UConn's Ball (wrist) to miss all of next season
stories.summary: UConn guard Solo Ball will undergo wrist surgery and miss the entire 2026-27 season.

stories.title: 🏈 Jordan Reid's seven-round NFL mock draft
stories.summary: Jordan Reid projected every single pick for this week's NFL draft, from the Raiders' selection at No. 1 to Mr. Irrelevant.
